summary: Excellent recording of a very good show, praised for both the performance and audio quality.
review: The reviewer calls this a "very good" concert and highlights that the recording remains excellent even 18 years later, emphasizing how the technology preserves the band's magic. No specific issues are noted, suggesting the audio is clear and enjoyable while the performance is solid throughout.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 5‑star review praises both the show and recording highly; with no negatives, the rating leans toward the top of the scale but confidence is limited by the small sample size.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer describes the recording as excellent with no noted flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; reviewer simply notes the show was very good.
